metadata.method_name: Closure-Certified Spatial RCC-8 Deduction over LLM reads vs neural baselines (decisive cross-path-intersection FORK + real-venue hallucination-reduction)
metadata.description: Two pre-registered questions on SpaRTUN/SpaRP-PS1. Q1: does cross-path full-PC INTERSECTION of disjunctive LLM RCC-8/CDC reads narrow deduction queries beyond best-single-path composition? Resolved by a ZERO-LLM a-priori gate over VERIFIED gold composition -> structural SCOPE-BOUNDARY (the gold graphs lack same-algebra multipath bite; mechanism synthetic-only, proven real by the RCC-8 positive control). Q2: does closure-certified deduction (read local stated RCC-8 constituents -> exact GQR-table compose -> abstain on collapse) reduce HALLUCINATION vs raw LLM generation / chain-of-thought on the 228 single-path RCC-8 deduction queries the venue hosts, at matched coverage, with Prolog trace-graphs.

headline_findings.Q1_reason: On the strongest real spatial venue (SpaRP-PS1, 27.4% structurally-flagged tight multipath), VERIFIED gold composition has ZERO same-algebra multi-path bite: the RCC-8 subgraph is a containment TREE (all 228 deduction queries have exactly 1 path), and cardinal short paths compose to SINGLETONS ({1: 54, 2: 2, 3: 1} best-single lengths over 57 >=2-path queries). The corpus's 27.4% flag is purely STRUCTURAL (undirected, no composition); the redundancy is CROSS-ALGEBRA (topology vs direction), not intersectable in one calculus. The mechanism is therefore synthetic-only here.
headline_findings.Q2_ABSTENTION_CONFOUND: the hallucination reduction is ABSTENTION-DRIVEN: the method answers only 14.9% of queries (abstains on logical collapse / non-singleton composition); raw answers 100%.
headline_findings.Q2_binding_constraint: LLM CONSTITUENT-READ RECALL (not the symbolic engine): constituent reads recall=0.55; the gold-read ORACLE resolves 0.89 at 0 hallucination -> the closure is SOUND and not the bottleneck. Disjunctive (sound) reads compose to broad/collapsed sets -> abstention; the coverage-vs-soundness tradeoff caps the method.
headline_findings.spatial_vs_temporal_read_breadth_note: spatial RCC-8 reads breadth=2.11/8 (underdet=0.04) vs temporal-Allen breadth 11.5/13 (underdet 0.87) -- spatial templated reads are FAR more informative; the spatial negative is STRUCTURAL, not a read-informativeness failure (the distinct second binding constraint of the temporal venue).

metadata.verdict_rationale: Q1 (cross-path intersection FORK) = SCOPE-BOUNDARY: the error-correcting-code mechanism does NOT realize on the real spatial venue, but for a SHARPER reason than the iter-4 temporal negative. There, the binding constraint was READ-informativeness (Allen reads near-universe, breadth 11.5/13). HERE the binding constraint is GOLD-STRUCTURAL: even with PERFECT reads (recall 0.55, breadth 2.11/8 -- spatial reads ARE informative), the gold graphs of SpaRTUN contain NO same-algebra multi-path redundancy with bite (RCC-8 = containment tree; cardinal short paths already resolve to singletons). The mechanism is genuinely synthetic-only (the RCC-8 positive control at r=0.95 shows intersection sel-acc 0.890 > best-single 0.797). Q2 (transferable contribution) = ABSTENTION-DRIVEN-HALLUCINATION-REDUCTION: on the 228 single-path RCC-8 deduction queries SpaRP-PS1 DOES host, closure-certified deduction (read local stated constituents -> exact-table compose -> abstain on collapse/non-singleton) cuts the confident-wrong rate from 0.193 (raw LLM) / 0.123 (chain-of-thought) to 0.022 (reduction +0.171, 95% CI [0.118,0.228], Holm-significant), with auditable Prolog traces. CRUCIAL HONESTY: this reduction is ABSTENTION-DRIVEN, not an accuracy gain -- the method answers only 14.9% of queries (vs raw 100%), and at MATCHED coverage the raw LLM is NOT less accurate (method sel-acc 0.853 vs raw 0.941; gap CI [-0.2222222222222222, 0.038461538461538436]). A neural baseline given the SAME abstention signal (raw-abstain) reaches hallucination 0.035 at coverage 0.29 -> the symbolic method does NOT dominate it. The gold-read ORACLE resolves 0.890 at 0 hallucination -> the symbolic closure is SOUND and NOT the bottleneck; the binding constraint is constituent-read recall (0.55) under the coverage-vs-soundness tradeoff. NET: the certified abstain-on-collapse mechanism genuinely converts confident-wrong LLM outputs into auditable abstentions, but on this venue it does not beat a confidence-thresholded neural baseline -- the value is interpretability/auditability of the abstention, not raw accuracy.

config.closure_algebra: RCC-8 (8 base) + CDC (9 base, product of two point algebras)

metadata.TAG_THEOREM: RCC-8/CDC PC-2 closure is SOUND (RCC-8 incomplete -> coverage/collapse are sound LOWER BOUNDS; CDC convex -> complete). The intersection/composition of SOUND read sets is ALWAYS sound, so every narrowing/abstain-on-collapse certificate is valid.

description_recovery.note: id->natural phrase (e.g. '1x2'->'medium yellow apple of box two'); usable iff a content token appears in the story.

H_method_vs_raw_selacc.ci_note: percentile CI brackets the bootstrap MEDIAN; `brackets` flags whether it also contains the full-sample point gap (R1 fix).

H_method_vs_cot_selacc.ci_note: percentile CI brackets the bootstrap MEDIAN; `brackets` flags whether it also contains the full-sample point gap (R1 fix).

method_vs_raw_abstain_selacc.ci_note: percentile CI brackets the bootstrap MEDIAN; `brackets` flags whether it also contains the full-sample point gap (R1 fix).

gold_read_oracle.note: feed gold atomic constituents -> closure: proves the symbolic engine is not the bottleneck (any real-arm loss is a READ failure).

synthetic_rcc8_positive_control.note: consistent-by-construction RCC-8 QCNs (1-D interval model), noisy reads; positive control that the comparison code detects a true cross-path effect when same-algebra redundancy + sound reads exist.

traces.label: synthetic cross-path intersection: best-single ['DC', 'NTPPi', 'TPPi'] (non-singleton) narrowed by intersecting two paths (p1=['DC', 'EC', 'NTPP', 'PO', 'TPP'], p2=['DC', 'NTPPi', 'TPPi']) to ['DC']
traces.program:
% Closure-certified spatial deduction (RCC-8) -- synthetic cross-path intersection: best-single ['DC', 'NTPPi', 'TPPi'] (non-singleton) narrowed by intersecting two paths (p1=['DC', 'EC', 'NTPP', 'PO', 'TPP'], p2=['DC', 'NTPPi', 'TPPi']) to ['DC'].
% Per path: compose the stated LOCAL RCC-8 reads (exact GQR table). Then INTERSECT
% the per-path constraints (cross-path closure). Singleton => ANSWER; empty =>
% Mode-B collapse (inconsistent reads flagged, NOT hallucinated); else ABSTAIN.
:- discontiguous pathcomp/2.

% path0: read(S->W1)=[dc] ; read(W1->T)=[ec]
pathcomp(p0, [dc,ec,ntpp,po,tpp]).
% path1: read(S->W2)=[dc,tppi] ; read(W2->T)=[tppi]
pathcomp(p1, [dc,ntppi,tppi]).

inter(R) :- findall(S, pathcomp(_, S), Ss), Ss = [H|T], foldl(isect, T, H, R).
isect(A, B, C) :- findall(X, (member(X, A), member(X, B)), C).
% engine intersection of all path constraints = [dc]
main :- ( inter(R) ->
    ( R = [Single] -> format('QUERY-REL: ~w~nVERDICT: ANSWER(~w)~n', [R, Single])
    ; R = [] -> format('QUERY-REL: []~nVERDICT: COLLAPSE(Mode-B inconsistent)~n', [])
    ; format('QUERY-REL: ~w~nVERDICT: ABSTAIN(non-singleton)~n', [R]) )
  ; write('VERDICT: ABSTAIN(no-path)'), nl ), halt.

:- initialization(main).
traces.note: two edge-disjoint paths' sound compositions INTERSECT to the correct singleton while the best single path stays ambiguous -- the error-correcting-code mechanism (works on synthetic, absent in real gold).

traces.label: real SpaRP-PS1 closure-certified deduction (SpaRP-PS1_test_1036: 1x0->2)
traces.program:
% Closure-certified spatial deduction (RCC-8) -- real SpaRP-PS1 closure-certified deduction (SpaRP-PS1_test_1036: 1x0->2).
% Per path: compose the stated LOCAL RCC-8 reads (exact GQR table). Then INTERSECT
% the per-path constraints (cross-path closure). Singleton => ANSWER; empty =>
% Mode-B collapse (inconsistent reads flagged, NOT hallucinated); else ABSTAIN.
:- discontiguous pathcomp/2.

% path0: read(1x0->1)=[tpp] ; read(1->2)=[ntpp]
pathcomp(p0, [ntpp]).

inter(R) :- findall(S, pathcomp(_, S), Ss), Ss = [H|T], foldl(isect, T, H, R).
isect(A, B, C) :- findall(X, (member(X, A), member(X, B)), C).
% engine intersection of all path constraints = [ntpp]
main :- ( inter(R) ->
    ( R = [Single] -> format('QUERY-REL: ~w~nVERDICT: ANSWER(~w)~n', [R, Single])
    ; R = [] -> format('QUERY-REL: []~nVERDICT: COLLAPSE(Mode-B inconsistent)~n', [])
    ; format('QUERY-REL: ~w~nVERDICT: ABSTAIN(non-singleton)~n', [R]) )
  ; write('VERDICT: ABSTAIN(no-path)'), nl ), halt.

:- initialization(main).

traces.label: real SpaRP-PS1 closure-certified deduction (SpaRP-PS1_test_1158: 1->0x1)
traces.program:
% Closure-certified spatial deduction (RCC-8) -- real SpaRP-PS1 closure-certified deduction (SpaRP-PS1_test_1158: 1->0x1).
% Per path: compose the stated LOCAL RCC-8 reads (exact GQR table). Then INTERSECT
% the per-path constraints (cross-path closure). Singleton => ANSWER; empty =>
% Mode-B collapse (inconsistent reads flagged, NOT hallucinated); else ABSTAIN.
:- discontiguous pathcomp/2.

% path0: read(1->0)=[tppi] ; read(0->0x1)=[ntppi]
pathcomp(p0, [ntppi]).

inter(R) :- findall(S, pathcomp(_, S), Ss), Ss = [H|T], foldl(isect, T, H, R).
isect(A, B, C) :- findall(X, (member(X, A), member(X, B)), C).
% engine intersection of all path constraints = [ntppi]
main :- ( inter(R) ->
    ( R = [Single] -> format('QUERY-REL: ~w~nVERDICT: ANSWER(~w)~n', [R, Single])
    ; R = [] -> format('QUERY-REL: []~nVERDICT: COLLAPSE(Mode-B inconsistent)~n', [])
    ; format('QUERY-REL: ~w~nVERDICT: ABSTAIN(non-singleton)~n', [R]) )
  ; write('VERDICT: ABSTAIN(no-path)'), nl ), halt.

:- initialization(main).

traces.label: Mode-B collapse: two paths give disjoint constraints (NTPP vs DC) -> inconsistent reads flagged
traces.program:
% Closure-certified spatial deduction (RCC-8) -- Mode-B collapse: two paths give disjoint constraints (NTPP vs DC) -> inconsistent reads flagged.
% Per path: compose the stated LOCAL RCC-8 reads (exact GQR table). Then INTERSECT
% the per-path constraints (cross-path closure). Singleton => ANSWER; empty =>
% Mode-B collapse (inconsistent reads flagged, NOT hallucinated); else ABSTAIN.
:- discontiguous pathcomp/2.

% path0: read(A->B)=[ntpp] ; read(B->C)=[ntpp]
pathcomp(p0, [ntpp]).
% path1: read(A->D)=[dc] ; read(D->C)=[ntppi]
pathcomp(p1, [dc]).

inter(R) :- findall(S, pathcomp(_, S), Ss), Ss = [H|T], foldl(isect, T, H, R).
isect(A, B, C) :- findall(X, (member(X, A), member(X, B)), C).
% engine intersection of all path constraints = []
main :- ( inter(R) ->
    ( R = [Single] -> format('QUERY-REL: ~w~nVERDICT: ANSWER(~w)~n', [R, Single])
    ; R = [] -> format('QUERY-REL: []~nVERDICT: COLLAPSE(Mode-B inconsistent)~n', [])
    ; format('QUERY-REL: ~w~nVERDICT: ABSTAIN(non-singleton)~n', [R]) )
  ; write('VERDICT: ABSTAIN(no-path)'), nl ), halt.

:- initialization(main).

cost.note: OpenRouter spend not served from the sha256 disk cache; reruns are $0.

honesty_caveats: SpaRP-PS1 is TEMPLATED (not natural), docs 130-1170 chars (NOT the 3000-char target); the closure-certified-deduction result is a REALISTIC-text, single-relation-query result.
RCC-8 PC is sound-but-INCOMPLETE: coverage/collapse are SOUND LOWER BOUNDS; intersection/composition of sound read sets is always sound, so narrowing/abstain certificates are valid.

Q1 cross-path-intersection mechanism is SYNTHETIC-ONLY: the real gold graphs lack same-algebra multipath-with-bite (RCC-8 tree; cardinal short-path singletons). This is a $0 GOLD-STRUCTURAL finding, independent of LLM reads.

The corpus's 27.4% genuine_multipath_with_bite_tight flag is PURELY STRUCTURAL (undirected, mixed-algebra, NO composition); verified single-algebra composition bite is 0 -- vindicating the dataset card's own 'verify, don't trust noise labels' caveat at a deeper level.
Q2 hallucination reduction is measured as confident-wrong rate vs raw/CoT that always answer; METHOD's abstain-on-collapse + abstain-on-nonsingleton is the auditable mechanism.
